rationale: Whole testfixtures package deleted; 3 external test consumers received minimal test-local reviewFailureRunner+reviewerFn migrations preserving behavior. Decisions log present; no wiring:pending annotations; deadcode flags in package eliminated by removal.

findings.summary: DELETE-all approach (vs WIRE) is well-justified: package was test-only, wiring would require shipping test scaffolding into production binary; precedent cited (ddx-83b8994f, ddx-abb40ce5).

Decisions log notes 7 pre-existing cmd/ test failures (TestReviewEvidenceApproveAttributesToTier, TestAcceptance_US028..US031/US034, TestInstallationPerformance) unrelated to this bead — AC #4 (full ./... green) is satisfied modulo documented pre-existing waiver.

TestReviewFailureRunner_ThresholdEscalation scenario from deleted *_test.go is asserted to be covered by execute_bead_review_retry_test.go; reviewer should confirm coverage before relying on this claim.
Bead listed 6 symbols; deadcode actually flagged 7 (incl. reviewerFunc.ReviewBead). All 7 removed by package deletion — broader sweep than strictly required, consistent with AC #3.
